Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate And/Or Writ Of Adminstrative Mandate
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CP III RINCON TOWERS, INC.'s Petition For Writ Of Mandate And/Or Writ Of Adminstrative Mandate is continued to May 6, 2014 to give Rincon EV Realty LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Rincon EV Realty LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 18, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
